response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings approximately 20 years of broad software engineering experience and recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, which demonstrates awareness of the space. However, the role requires director-level individual contributor leadership with recognized AI expertise, a track record of building AI products and platforms at scale, and the credibility to advise strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. None of these are evidenced in the resume. His AI work is confined to a single year at re:cinq, his career peak is 'Staff Software Engineer,' and there is no cloud platform strategy experience, advanced AI/ML degree, or demonstrable thought leadership that would position him at the Principal/Director IC level this role demands.
strengths: Over 20 years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, satisfying the minimum tenure requirement.
Recent direct contribution to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, showing current engagement with the AI tooling space.
Founder of GISCollective and experience across multiple early-stage companies demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and end-to-end product ownership.
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (2025) and tactical rather than strategic — no demonstrated record of shipping recognized AI products or platforms with measurable impact.
Career ceiling is 'Staff Software Engineer' with no evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-organizational technical influence.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud platform strategy experience, both explicitly listed as preferred qualifications.

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
Seniority level and strategic leadership scope
Entrepreneurial background and broad engineering breadth
